name: Mexican Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the tortilla slices in vegetable oil until crispy, then drain on a paper towel.
2. In a small amount of oil, fry the onion until transparent. Add tomato sauce, cook, and stir in the broth, salt, pepper, and dried chicken broth.
3. Serve by adding the tortillas, fried dried pasilla chiles (cut into small pieces), 1 tablespoon cream, cheese, and a slice of avocado.
